text: Can it have 4 players at once. Or else my kids gone tear it up lol
text_zh: 能4个人一起玩吗？不然我孩子得疯了哈哈

text: Love that game fruit ninja is awesome
text_zh: 喜欢那个游戏，水果忍者超棒

text: Is it one player at a time?
text_zh: 一次一个人玩吗？

text: On my way over to make Zo be the 4th player!
text_zh: 我这就过去让Zo成为第四个玩家！

text: This is our favorite game for kids!!!
text_zh: 这是我们给孩子最喜欢的游戏！！！

text: This is really cool! I’m gonna snag us up for my grandson’s
text_zh: 这个太酷了！我要给我孙子买一个

text: I was just saying I wanted to get a Wii but now I think I need this !
text_zh: 我刚才还在说想买个 Wii，但现在我觉得我需要这个了！

text: Ima get it for myself
text_zh: 我要给我自己买

text: This is my first time ever hearing Party Game and Candyland in the same sentence. What?!
text_zh: 我第一次听到“派对游戏”和“糖果乐园”在同一个句子里。什么？！

text: this xbox 360 Kinect?
text_zh: 这是 Xbox 360 Kinect 吗？

text: That’s super cool
text_zh: 这太酷了

text: its fun to watxh and it worn me out! a good way to excerise lol
text_zh: 看着有趣，而且把我累坏了！是个不错的锻炼方式哈哈

text: We love ours!!!
text_zh: 我们爱我们的！！！

text: That’s great! 😅 I love this thing!
text_zh: 太棒了！😅 我爱死这个了！

text: Sooo cool
text_zh: 太酷了

text: This looks like so much fun!
text_zh: 这个看起来太好玩了！

text: So fun! 🤩
text_zh: 太好玩了！🤩

text: … its giving Wii vibes
text_zh: ……感觉像 Wii

text: This is really cool
text_zh: 这真的很酷

text: Ohhhh love this!!
text_zh: 哦哦，喜欢这个！！

text: So you can do this without a screen and hyper-stimulation
text_zh: 所以你可以在没有屏幕和过度刺激的情况下玩这个？

text: you have to buy a play pass $49 for 3 months or $89 for 12 to access more than 5 games.
text_zh: 你得买个 Play Pass，3 个月 49 美元，12 个月 89 美元，才能玩超过 5 个游戏。

text: Do all those games come with it ?
text_zh: 这些游戏都带吗？

text: That's what we did too! Eyeing for a while but then summer hit so we got it!
text_zh: 我们也是这么做的！看了一段时间了，然后夏天到了就买了！

text: what is this called??? I need it!!
text_zh: 这叫什么名字？？我需要它！！

text: This is what I asked my husband to get me for my birthday lol, fingers crossed!
text_zh: 这就是我让我老公送我生日礼物的，嘻嘻，祈祷中！

text: Are the games included or do you have to buy them separately
text_zh: 游戏是包含在里面的还是得另外买？

text: I love this !!!
text_zh: 我爱这个！！！

text: I love the pj sets! My girls would love those!
text_zh: 我太喜欢这睡衣了！我女儿们肯定会喜欢的！

text: Now this is what my house needs !
text_zh: 这才是我家需要的东西！

text: what is this called?
text_zh: 这是什么呀？

text: Its similar to wii
text_zh: 跟Wii很像

text: Yes I need this for my son and I summer time is here NEED IT
text_zh: 是的是的，我需要这个给我儿子，夏天到了，急需！

text: How cool, I need this for myself 😅
text_zh: 太酷了，我也需要这个 😅

text: @Levi Reda
text_zh: @Levi Reda

text: This thing is SO MUCH FUN! Wear your smart watch and see how many calories you burn. I was shocked!
text_zh: 这东西太好玩了！戴上你的智能手表看看能烧多少卡路里。我震惊了！
